title: arenaria formosa var. glandulosa
intro: Arenaria formosa var. glandulosa, also known as glandular beautybush or glandular sandwort, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Arenaria formosa var. glandulosa include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it can be applied directly to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
